links.title: Token Utilization
links.tooltip: Full daily token breakdown by type (input / output / cache) plus plan utilization trend

links.title: Per-Project Breakdown
links.tooltip: Drill into per-project usage, tool mix, and archetype mix

links.title: Model Usage
links.tooltip: Token volume split across Claude models, with per-project and main vs subagent breakdowns

links.title: Prompt Cost Ranking
links.tooltip: Most expensive prompts, sessions, and tools

panels.title: Current Plan
panels.description: Detected Claude plan tier (PRO / MAX5 / MAX20). Pulled from the latest OAuth poll.

targets.rawSql: SELECT plan FROM usage_snapshots ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Plan utilization (5h)
panels.description: How much of the rolling 5-hour rate-limit budget is currently consumed. Approaching 100% means throttling is imminent.

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp AS time, utilization_pct AS value FROM usage_snapshots WHERE window_name = 'five_hour' AND timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() ORDER BY timestamp

panels.title: Plan utilization (7d)
panels.description: How much of the rolling 7-day rate-limit budget is currently consumed. The slower-moving sibling of the 5-hour gauge.

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp AS time, utilization_pct AS value FROM usage_snapshots WHERE window_name = 'seven_day' AND timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() ORDER BY timestamp

panels.title: Tokens this week
panels.description: Sum of input + output tokens for tool messages since this week's Monday (Europe/Madrid). Excludes cache and assistant text to track active workflow signal.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens), 0)::bigint AS tokens FROM messages_classified mc JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = mc.message_uuid WHERE mc.archetype IS NOT NULL AND mc.timestamp >= date_trunc('week', NOW(), 'Europe/Madrid')

panels.title: Daily Claude activity
panels.description: Total tokens consumed per day across all token types (input + output + cache). One line — overall volume only, no per-type breakdown. Use the Token Utilization dashboard for the full split.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('day', m.timestamp, 'Europe/Madrid') AS time, SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens + t.cache_creation_tokens + t.cache_read_tokens) AS total_tokens FROM token_usage t JOIN messages m ON m.message_uuid = t.message_uuid WHERE m.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Top projects by tokens
panels.description:
Top 10 projects ranked by total tokens (input + output + cache) over the selected window. Identifies the codebases driving the most Claude usage.

Click a bar to open the Per-Project Breakdown dashboard pre-filtered to that project.

targets.rawSql: SELECT s.project, SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens + t.cache_read_tokens + t.cache_creation_tokens) AS total_tokens FROM token_usage t JOIN messages m ON m.message_uuid = t.message_uuid JOIN sessions s ON s.session_id = m.session_id WHERE m.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY s.project ORDER BY total_tokens DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Work mix per week (%)
panels.description:
Weekly tool tokens normalized to 100% and split by archetype (kind of work). Reveals shifts in the *type* of work over time, independent of total volume.

Archetypes:
- **exploration** — reading & searching code (Read, Grep, Glob, bash read/search/git-read)
- **active_coding** — modifying files (Edit, Write, MultiEdit)
- **shell_ops** — file ops, git writes, arbitrary shell commands
- **self_orchestration** — spawning subagents and managing todo lists (Task, Agent, TaskCreate/Update/List/etc.)
- **build_test** — compile, test, and dependency commands
- **infra_ops** — infrastructure and database operations
- **research** — external info gathering (WebFetch, WebSearch, ToolSearch)
- **mcp** — any MCP tool call
- **other** — tool call that didn't match the rules above

targets.rawSql: WITH weekly AS (SELECT date_trunc('week', mc.timestamp, 'Europe/Madrid') AS time, mc.archetype, SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens)::numeric AS tokens FROM messages_classified mc JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = mc.message_uuid WHERE mc.archetype IS NOT NULL AND mc.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1, 2), totals AS (SELECT time, SUM(tokens) AS total FROM weekly GROUP BY time) SELECT w.time, MAX(CASE WHEN w.archetype = 'exploration'        THEN w.tokens / NULLIF(t.total,0) END)::float AS exploration, MAX(CASE WHEN w.archetype = 'active_coding'      THEN w.tokens / NULLIF(t.total,0) END)::float AS active_coding, MAX(CASE WHEN w.archetype = 'shell_ops'          THEN w.tokens / NULLIF(t.total,0) END)::float AS shell_ops, MAX(CASE WHEN w.archetype = 'self_orchestration' THEN w.tokens / NULLIF(t.total,0) END)::float AS self_orchestration, MAX(CASE WHEN w.archetype = 'infra_ops'          THEN w.tokens / NULLIF(t.total,0) END)::float AS infra_ops, MAX(CASE WHEN w.archetype = 'research'           THEN w.tokens / NULLIF(t.total,0) END)::float AS research, MAX(CASE WHEN w.archetype = 'build_test'         THEN w.tokens / NULLIF(t.total,0) END)::float AS build_test, MAX(CASE WHEN w.archetype = 'mcp'                THEN w.tokens / NULLIF(t.total,0) END)::float AS mcp, MAX(CASE WHEN w.archetype = 'other'              THEN w.tokens / NULLIF(t.total,0) END)::float AS other FROM weekly w JOIN totals t ON t.time = w.time GROUP BY w.time ORDER BY w.time
